problem: Cursor and Windows sub-shells repeatedly trigger 1Password desktop CLI authorization prompts.
cause: 1Password desktop CLI integration authorizes per Windows process/session; Windows sub-shell commands can require separate authorization.

fix.authPath: OP_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_TOKEN loaded from Windows Credential Manager for each wrapped op command
fix.desktopPromptSuppression: OP_BIOMETRIC_UNLOCK_ENABLED=false in the Werkles Cursor terminal environment
fix.scope: Repo-local Cursor terminal settings and repo-local op wrapper

remainingAction: Open a new Cursor terminal, or reload the Cursor window, so the workspace terminal settings take effect.
